fragment.choose:
<when condition="@(context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault("requestedModel", "") == "non-llm-request")">
            
        
        
            
            <set-variable name="selected-backend" value="@{
                var apiType = context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault("api-type", "openai");
                var modelId = context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault("requestedModel", "unknown");
                var models = context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault("config-models");
                var apiTypes = context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault("config-api-types");

                // Check if api-type has an explicit backend (e.g., responses → standard-responses-backend)
                var apiTypeBackend = apiTypes?[apiType]?["backend"]?.ToString();
                if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(apiTypeBackend)) {
                    return apiTypeBackend;
                }

                // Look up model's backend from config
                var modelBackend = models?[modelId]?["backend"]?.ToString();
                if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(modelBackend)) {
                    return modelBackend;
                }

                return string.Empty;
            }" />

            
            
                <when condition="@(string.IsNullOrEmpty(context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault("selected-backend")))">
                    
                        @($"Unified AI - Backend not configured for model {context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault("requestedModel", "not-set")} with API type {context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault("api-type", "not-set")}")
                    
                    
                        
                        
                            application/json
                        
                        @{
                            return new JObject(
                                new JProperty("error", new JObject(
                                    new JProperty("message", $"Backend not configured for model '{context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault("requestedModel", "unknown")}' with API type '{context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault("api-type", "unknown")}'."),
                                    new JProperty("code", "backend_not_configured")
                                ))
                            ).ToString();
                        }
                    
                
            

            
            <set-backend-service backend-id="@(context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault("selected-backend"))" />

            
            
            

            
                @($"Unified AI - Backend {context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault("selected-backend", "not-set")} selected for model {context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault("requestedModel", "not-set")} with API type {context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault("api-type", "not-set")}")
